title: Adding Multiple Contacts to Accounts
excerpt: I am trying to add multiple contacts to one account and not sure how to go about it. Some accounts have several contacts linked with it. Any help appreciated

posts.author: ZoeNortonWebb (Zoë Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to add multiple contacts to one account and not sure how to go about it. Some accounts have several contacts linked with it. Any help appreciated

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You should just be able to click in the contacts column and add another by clicking on the Plus button
